title: hieracium villosum subsp. glaucifrons
intro: Hieracium villosum subsp. glaucifrons, commonly known as the woolly hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Hieracium villosum subsp. glaucifrons include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce inflammation and protect the body from oxidative damage. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a valuable addition to traditional medicine.
